title: Searchable Merge Target Selector in Metric Wizard
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to search and select a merge target from my existing metrics list, so that I can quickly find the right metric even when the list contains 100+ entries.
description:
Replaces the long scrollable list of existing metrics in the Metric Wizard merge step with a searchable select control. Customers can accumulate 100+ metrics, making scroll-based selection impractical.

The merge option label is also refined from 'Merge into an existing metric' to 'Add as alias to existing metric' for clarity on the action being performed.
acceptance_criteria: Merge target list uses a searchable select control instead of a scrollable list
User can type to filter existing metrics by name
Merge option label reads 'Add as alias to existing metric'
ux_changes: Searchable select control for merge target selection. Label updated to 'Add as alias to existing metric'.
comment_summary: Developer implemented search and select. Discussion refined the merge option label for clarity — 'Add as alias to existing metric' instead of 'Merge into an existing metric'.
